text: morning all — Pinnacle gala selects are uploading now, should be in the shared drive by noon
amazing, thank you Larry. the client is asking about the group shots specifically
group shots are in folder 2, already color-corrected. flagged my three favorites
Rosewood listing shoot moved to Thursday 8am — earlier light is better for the west-facing units
works for me, I'll have the keys and the units staged by 7:45
need a second shooter for the Bell wedding on Jan 14th, ceremony at 4. anyone free?
I'm in — I'll bring the 70-200 and a backup body
I can cover getting-ready shots if you want a third for the first hour
perfect — Avery on ceremony, Sasha on prep. shot list goes out tonight
finished the first pass on the Whitman gallery — 240 selects, ready for your review
nice, I'll do the final cull tomorrow morning. hold the skin-tone edits until I look
two new inquiries this week — a corporate headshot day and a spring maternity session
the maternity lead mentioned the Porch Light series, that's how she found you
shot three more porches in Plaza Midwood tonight — the light was unreal around 5:40
the one with the blue door is the strongest frame you've made for this series
renting the 24mm tilt-shift from LensProToGo for the architecture set next week
site's updated with the new gallery grid btw — check it on mobile when you get a sec
dropped the refreshed logo lockups in the brand folder, two weights for print vs web
these are great — going with the lighter weight for the watermark
studio closed the week of Thanksgiving, back the following Monday — book accordingly
anyone tried the new roaster on North Davidson yet?
the oat latte there is dangerously good, I'm there most mornings before edits
